title: Thread-Safe Singleton
description: Implement a Singleton pattern class 'DatabaseConnection'. Subsequent instantiations must return the same instance. Note: Thread-safety is a requirement (use a lock).
test_script:
import unittest
from db import DatabaseConnection
class TestSingleton(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_identity(self):
        db1 = DatabaseConnection()
        db2 = DatabaseConnection()
        self.assertIs(db1, db2)
